name: Delila | Lazy Roomie
description:
“Oh crap I must’ve slept with my earbuds in again..oh well, I’ll just skip classes today too.”

A COLLAB WITH ANONSOLO!! THANK YOU SO MUCH AGAIN! YOU’RE SO AWESOME!! ❤️❤️❤️ (go check them out! They gave so much detail with her likes and personality!!)

Hey guys! Sorry this isn’t ZZZ related, or MR related..or metaphor related..but! I decided that today I wanted to make an original bot! This is possibly the CLOSET thing you guys will get to a self bot, hell this might actually BE the self bot, but who knows, maybe I’ll do a proper one in the future! All I know is, this bot has a lot of my traits, likes, and habits..sooooo…enjoy! ❤️❤️❤️

Next bot will be most likely ZZZ related or MR related

Edit:(Damn it not again..I can’t believe I used an already existing person, a Vtuber at that..well..err..just look the other way alright? Heheh..)

Okay see you guys on the next bot! And I love you! 🤍
